place_name: Wildseed Cafe at The Alkaff Mansion
notes: Official outlet page links to the Alkaff Mansion all-day menu PDF and confirms menu periods; item names and prices were cross-checked against Quandoo because the official PDF could not be parsed directly by the research tool. Prices are subject to service charge and GST.

items.name: Bagel Eggs Benny
items.description: Toasted bagel with sous vide eggs, arugula, radish and hollandaise; choice of smoked salmon or bacon.

items.name: Fully Loaded Avocado Toast
items.description: Sourdough with avocado, prawns, smoked salmon, bacon, mushrooms, tomato, pumpkin and seeds.

items.name: Big Pan Breakfast
items.description: Breakfast plate with smoked chicken bockwurst, corn, mushrooms, avocado, tomato, tater tots and sourdough.

items.name: Truffle Brie Pizza
items.description: Pizza with brie, oyster mushrooms, mozzarella, truffle oil and truffle cream sauce.

items.name: Soft Shell Chilli Crab Linguine
items.description: Linguine with fried soft shell crab, crab meat, cherry tomatoes and chilli crab sauce.

items.name: Honey Pork Ribs
items.description: Slow-cooked back ribs with rosemary, curly fries, corn and honey glaze.

items.name: Enchanted Pistachio & Pear Garden Cake
items.description: Pistachio and pear cake.

items.name: Kit Kat Banana Croffle
items.description: Croffle with Kit Kat bites, banana, vanilla bean ice cream and Kit Kat spread.

notes: Official January 2026 brunch PDF from Symmetry's menu page. Prices are subject to GST and service charges; V on the menu marks vegetarian-friendly items.

items.name: Soft Eggs in Creamy Mushrooms
items.description: 62.5C eggs with pork belly, caramelised onions, chives, mustard and pain de mie.

items.name: Dirty Crab
items.description: Sunny-side eggs with crab meat, hash brown, chilli crunch, tobiko, jalapeno aioli and chilli crab dressing.

items.name: Symmetry Full Breakfast
items.description: Eggs with chicken cheese sausage, hashbrown, brussels sprouts, bacon, smoked salmon, corn fritter and crab toast.

items.name: Spanish Omelette
items.description: Omelette with jamon iberico, baby spinach, potatoes, cheddar, mojo rojo and jalapeno aioli.

items.name: Vegan Breakfast
items.description: Hummus, corn, chickpeas, broccolini, pumpkin, seeds, brussels sprouts, soybeans, hashbrown and lettuce.

items.name: Vegetarian Aglio Olio
items.description: Pasta with sauteed mushrooms, brussels sprouts, garlic confit, arugula and chilli padi.

items.name: Symmetry Hummus
items.description: Hummus with flat bread, crispy chickpeas, roasted beetroot, pumpkin seeds, currant and mojo rojo.

items.name: Açai Bowl
items.description: Acai with bircher muesli, chia seeds, almonds, apples, cherry compote, banana and cocoa nibs.

notes: Official Five Oars digital menu for the Upper East Coast/Katong-area outlet. Prices are before GST; dine-in is subject to service charge.

items.name: Acai Bowl
items.description: Acai with mixed berries, banana, mixed nuts and coconut flakes.

items.name: Cauliflower Salad
items.description: Roasted cauliflower, quinoa, baby spinach, halloumi, pine nuts, almonds and lemon vinaigrette.

items.name: Avocado Toast
items.description: Sourdough with poached eggs, cherry tomatoes, ricotta, almonds and dukkah.

items.name: Chilli Crab Scramble
items.description: Sourdough with scrambled eggs, soft-shell crab and Thai asparagus.

items.name: Prawn Aglio Olio
items.description: Squid ink spaghetti with tiger prawns, tomatoes, garlic, chilli and sakura ebi.

items.name: Wagyu Cheeseburger
items.description: Brioche bun with wagyu patty, aged cheddar, sunny-side egg and fries.

items.name: Salted Caramel Banana Waffles
items.description: Sourdough waffles with banana, cookie crumbs, hazelnuts, salted caramel, ice cream and whipped cream.

items.name: Meringue French Toast
items.description: Brioche with lemon curd, meringue, mixed berries, almond crumble, honeycomb and vanilla ice cream.

notes: Official 111 Somerset page links to the current store menu and confirms the outlet serves brunch, cakes, coffee, waffles and gelato. Item-level prices were cross-checked against OrchardMalls' parsed menu for this specific outlet.

items.name: Classic Gelato Waffles
items.description: Waffles with a scoop of gelato and maple syrup.

items.name: Fresh Berries Waffles
items.description: Waffles with red berries compote, strawberries, blueberries, berry gelato and maple syrup.

items.name: Honey Soy Garlic Fried Chicken Waffles
items.description: Brown butter waffles with crispy chicken karaage and honey soy garlic glaze.

items.name: Rise Breakfast Waffles
items.description: Brown butter waffles with chicken bratwurst, sauteed mushrooms, eggs, fruit and salad.

items.name: Avocado & Eggs Croast
items.description: Butter croissant with avocado, eggs and house salad.

items.name: Wild Truffle Mushroom Soup
items.description: Blended mushroom soup with truffle oil and sourdough toast.

items.name: Scallop Rose Rigatoni
items.description: Rigatoni with gochujang cream sauce and seared scallops.

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Cream Pasta
items.description: Spaghetti with sauteed mushrooms, truffle cream sauce and Parmigiano Reggiano.
